allow: Bash(node -e "const j=require\('./public/europeScenario.json'\); console.log\('meta:', JSON.stringify\(j.meta\)\); console.log\('map keys:', Object.keys\(j.map\)\); console.log\('map dims:', j.map.width, j.map.height, j.map.tileSize\); console.log\('nations:', j.nations.length, JSON.stringify\(j.nations[0]\)\); console.log\('cities:', j.cities.length, JSON.stringify\(j.cities[0]\)\); console.log\('units:', j.units.length, JSON.stringify\(j.units[0]\)\);")
